question: The chart shows the annual budget distribution of City A across different sectors. Based on the data in the chart, which statement is correct?

options.A: Safety receives the largest share of the budget.
options.B: Healthcare receives the largest share of the budget.
options.C: Education receives the largest share of the budget.
options.D: Infrastructure receives the largest share of the budget.

explanation: This pie chart uses dual encoding: slice angle represents percentage, and the radius also varies with percentage, so slice area differences are exaggerated. That can make the largest category look overly dominant. Safety: 35%; Healthcare: 25%; Education: 20%; Others: 10%; Infrastructure: 10%.
